title: Diesel Direct Powers Steamship Authority's Renewable Fuel Trial in New England Waters
content: Diesel Direct, the largest asset-based mobile fueling provider in the U.S., is supporting the Steamship Authority in launching the East Coastâ€™s first R99 renewable diesel marine pilot aboard the M/V Island Home, operating between Woods Hole and Martha's Vineyard. Running from June 1 to September 1, 2025, the program aims to cut lifecycle greenhouse gas emissions by 50â€“78% compared to conventional diesel, without requiring engine modifications. Approved unanimously by the Authority's Board and Port Council, the pilot could lead to all ten ferries transitioning to renewable diesel if successful.
author: Analysts Account
